.meta.comment:
Emit per-flow TCP health metrics to Kafka for data warehouse  ingestion. Designed for durable peer-to-peer socket monitoring (e.g. ISO 8583) where both endpoints use static ports.
v3.3.0 with rate limiting feature.
.meta.name: TCP Flow Health Monitor
